message:
feat(stream): support XADD partial auto-ID (ms-*) for explicit timestamp

XADD now accepts IDs in the format "ms-*" which specifies the
millisecond timestamp explicitly while auto-generating the sequence
number. This is a Redis 7.0+ feature commonly used for time-based
stream partitioning.

Adds 9 conformance tests covering sequence incrementing, ms reset,
rejection of lower timestamps, and combination with MAXLEN.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
